mundo.titulo: Married at First Sight UK rape allegations serious, says government
mundo.resumen: A BBC Panorama investigation revealed allegations that two women had been raped during filming.

mundo.titulo: Victim or enabler? Epstein girlfriend who could face questions despite plea deal
mundo.resumen: Nadia Marcinko is relatively unknown but may soon be called before US legislators.

mundo.titulo: Grenfell fire charges sought for up to 57 people
mundo.resumen: The Met Police will submit files to the CPS including possible cases of corporate manslaughter.

mundo.titulo: Ebola outbreak may be spreading faster than first thought, WHO doctor warns
mundo.resumen: Hundreds of cases are suspected in central Africa but experts fear the actual number may be much higher.

mundo.titulo: Petrol hits highest price since start of Iran war
mundo.resumen: The average price of unleaded has risen to 158.52p a litre, according to the RAC, who warn that it could rise further in the coming weeks.

mundo.titulo: 'Big game scorer' Stewart and Curtis make Scotland World Cup squad
mundo.resumen: Ross Stewart and Findlay Curtis are named in Scotland's World Cup squad but there is no place for Lennon Miller.

negocios.titulo: Petrol hits highest price since start of Iran war
negocios.resumen: The average price of unleaded has risen to 158.52p a litre, according to the RAC, who warn that it could rise further in the coming weeks.

negocios.titulo: Swatch boss defends watch launch that sparked chaos and closures
negocios.resumen: Nick Hayek Jr says the pocket watch launch saw "overcrowding like hell" at a small number of its UK stores.

negocios.titulo: HS2 costs could top £100bn and trains will be slower than first planned
negocios.resumen: The new cost range and train speed are being announced as a "reset" of the delayed, over-budget and vastly scaled-back project is carried out.
The number of UK job vacancies also fell to its lowest level in five years as the initial impact of the Iran war on businesses starts to be seen.

negocios.titulo: Robo-top: The machines that could make your next t-shirt
negocios.resumen: Most clothes are made in Asia, but new machines could bring some of that work back to the West.

negocios.titulo: Elon Musk has lost yet another legal battle. Why he'll still keep fighting
negocios.resumen: Musk has lost his high-profile lawsuit against OpenAI, but is not likely to change his aggressive style.

tecnologia.titulo: Stilta raises $10.5M from a16z and YC to help companies rediscover the patents they forgot they had
tecnologia.resumen: Stilta announced Tuesday a $10 million seed round led by Andreessen Horowitz. Other investors in the round include YC and operators from companies like OpenAI, Legora, and Lovable.

tecnologia.titulo: Solar to dominate energy by 2035, but AI data centers will keep fossil fuels in business
tecnologia.resumen: Costs for solar panels are expected to drop another 30% in the coming decade, helping the tech cement its lead in energy markets.

tecnologia.titulo: Theo Baker spent four years investigating Stanford. Before he leaves, here’s what he found.
tecnologia.resumen: "There's a common refrain among [young] people in this world that it's easier to raise money for a startup right now than to get an internship. Which is remarkable, right?"

tecnologia.titulo: OSHA probing worker death at SpaceX’s Starbase site
tecnologia.resumen: The death is the latest worker safety issue at the Starbase facility, which has a higher injury rate than all other SpaceX sites.

tecnologia.titulo: SandboxAQ brings its drug discovery models to Claude — no PhD in computing required
tecnologia.resumen: Other venture-backed companies like Chai Discovery and Isomorphic Labs have raced to build better models. SandboxAQ is betting that access is the bigger obstacle and that Claude solves it.

tecnologia.titulo: Anthropic has acquired the dev tools startup used by OpenAI, Google, and Cloudflare
tecnologia.resumen: Stainless, a New York-based startup, founded in 2022, rose to prominence in the emerging AI industry for automating the creation and maintenance of software development kits, or SDKs — the libraries developers use to interact with APIs.

tecnologia.titulo: Nintendo keeps finding new ways to reinvent platformers
tecnologia.resumen: In most platforming games, you're fighting against the world around you. You're trying to beat a level, nail a seemingly impossible series of jumps, or defeat a powerful boss. But even though Yoshi and the Mysterious Book uses familiar gameplay - you traverse the world by jumping, climbing, and, uh, eating - it reframes your […]

tecnologia.titulo: Microsoft launches Surface Pro 12 and Surface Laptop 8 with Intel chips
tecnologia.resumen: Almost exactly two years ago, Microsoft introduced Arm-powered versions of the Surface Pro 11 and Surface Laptop 7, with Intel models not ready until more than six months later. This time around Microsoft is refreshing its Surface Pro and Surface Laptop models with Intel's latest Core Ultra Series 3 processors first, ahead of similar models […]

tecnologia.titulo: The Mandalorian and Grogu should have been a season of TV
tecnologia.resumen: When The Mandalorian first debuted on Disney Plus, it was a refreshing reminder of how fascinating Star Wars stories can be when they aren't focused on the same handful of well-established characters. Especially in its first season, the series felt like a sign that Disney was shifting gears after disappointing fans with its last trilogy […]

tecnologia.titulo: Marshall brings ANC back to its smaller on-ear wireless headphones
tecnologia.resumen: Marshall's first headphones with active noise canceling were the Marshall Mid A.N.C. first launched in 2018. Its current lineup only offers noise canceling on its larger over-ear Monitor III A.N.C. headphones, but its new Milton A.N.C. bring the feature back to Marshall's smaller and lighter on-ear options. The wireless headphones are available today for $229.99 […]

tecnologia.titulo: These are the robot vacuum-mops I recommend for every type of home
tecnologia.resumen: Inviting a robot vacuum-mop into your life is a big decision. An autonomous floor-cleaning machine roaming your home is equal parts glorious and intrusive. But if it does its job well, you may forgive it for eating your rug tassel, running over your Apple Watch, smearing strawberry jam across your carpet, or chattering to you […]

tecnologia.titulo: Xbox fans want exclusives, more backward compatibility, and free online multiplayer
tecnologia.resumen: Microsoft launched a new Xbox Player Voice portal yesterday, aiming to collect feedback from fans and "make it more visible." It certainly hasn't taken long for Xbox fans to make their feedback very clear. The most upvoted feedback on Xbox Player Voice demands exclusive games for Xbox consoles, more backward compatible games, and free online […]
